exact_cell_refs.contains: 全队30秒内谐破增幅提升40点
变奏出场角色全伤害加深+25%

source_backed_interpretation: 状态下，重击暴击伤害提升百分之三百；非战斗超过四秒获得即刻响应辉芒。
二段蓄力获得一百点同步值；击败转移与击败引爆不在单首领范围内。
共鸣解放伤害提升百分之四十；震谐与聚爆相关上限提升至六十层。
aemeath.korean_interpretation: 단일 지속 보스 범위에서는 처치 전이, 처치 폭발, 생존 효과를 배제하고 즉각 응답, 동조, 강화 피해, 파티 버프, 궤적 규칙만 구현한다.
aemeath.english_interpretation: Only source-backed single persistent boss mechanics are active. Kill transfer, kill detonation, S5, movement, and survival clauses are unsupported and must not be approximated.

source_backed_interpretation: 跃迁伤害提升百分之一百二十。
涂绘区域持续时间由三百帧延长至六百帧；吸引效果仅记录诊断。
退场后下一名角色获得伤害加深，切换至其他角色时提前结束。
lynae.korean_interpretation: 단일 지속 보스 범위에서는 도약 추가 피해, 분사장 지속 시간, 사전 오버플로 회복, 자기 및 다음 등장 캐릭터 피해 심화만 구현한다.
lynae.english_interpretation: Paint pull remains diagnostic-only because movement and pull are outside the account single-boss scope.

source_backed_interpretation: 观测标记持续二十秒，并同时附加干涉标记。
共鸣效率超过百分之一的部分转化为暴击伤害，上限百分之三十二。
施放分布式阵列时回复二十五点协奏能量和一百点相对动量，每二十五秒触发一次。
mornye.korean_interpretation: 단일 지속 보스 범위에서는 관측 표식, 공명 효율 기반 치명 피해, 편향 축적 효율, 분산 배열 자원 회복과 별빛 보정기 독립 재사용 대기시간만 구현한다.
mornye.english_interpretation: Marker-dependent values disappear when the marker is absent; Starfield R5 remains a separate weapon ICD.

effect_mappings.exact_source_excerpt: 速蓄状态下，蓄力期间获得牵引效果、重击/强化重击的暴击伤害提升300%。
effect_mappings.implementation_interpretation: Applies aemeath s1 heavy crit damage through characters/aemeath.py::AemeathMechanic.get_action_damage_multiplier using the source-backed value/timing (300%) once per accepted single-boss event without double-counting overlapping clauses.

effect_mappings.exact_source_excerpt: 非战斗状态且不处于重击/强化重击/大招2动作超过4秒时，获得C1速蓄状态，此时若未持有【大招2解锁前置】，施放强化重击时可额外获得100点同步率。
effect_mappings.implementation_interpretation: Applies aemeath s1 precombat radiance through simulator/account_constellation_effects.py::apply_precombat_constellation_state using the source-backed value/timing (4) once per accepted single-boss event without double-counting overlapping clauses.

effect_mappings.exact_source_excerpt: 非战斗状态且不处于重击/强化重击/大招2动作超过4秒时，获得C1速蓄状态，此时若未持有【大招2解锁前置】，施放强化重击时可额外获得100点同步率。
effect_mappings.implementation_interpretation: Applies aemeath s1 charged ii sync through characters/aemeath.py::AemeathMechanic.resolve_action using the source-backed value/timing (100) once per accepted single-boss event without double-counting overlapping clauses.

effect_mappings.exact_source_excerpt: 攻击击杀目标后记录其最高震谐/聚爆轨迹层数，10秒内可复制给下一命中目标并清空记录，清空后记录冷却1秒。
effect_mappings.implementation_interpretation: Records aemeath_s1_kill_trajectory_transfer_unsupported from the source clause (攻击击杀目标, 10) but excludes enemy death, replacement, revive, or kill settlement from the accepted single-boss runtime.

effect_mappings.exact_source_excerpt: 除强化E-震谐/震谐增幅以外的强化E伤害倍率提升100%。

Keeps Mornye S3 source state (+25 Concerto, +100 Momentum, 25s cooldown) separate from the equipped Starfield Calibrator R5 weapon state (+16 Concerto, 20s cooldown); the two source IDs and cooldown states never combine.
effect_mappings.source_description: Confirmed equipped Starfield Calibrator R5 account contract.

implemented_effects: Aemeath S1, S2, S3, S4, S6 single-boss supported clauses
Lynae S1 and S2 single-boss supported clauses
Mornye S1, S2, and S3 single-boss supported clauses
assumptions: All duration effects advance by combat time.
The account mechanics require explicit account_simulation_scope and explicit precombat_elapsed_seconds.
No account party, account route, account baseline, training, evaluation, search, or result artifact is created in candidate 121.
Existing v5/314 benchmark observation and 25 policy action surface remain unchanged.
